title: Connect indicator to live market data (real-time price feed)

requirements.text: Integrate a live market data feed into the frontend by polling a public REST API (e.g., Binance public REST API: https://api.binance.com/api/v3/klines) at a configurable interval (default: 10 seconds) to fetch the latest OHLC+Volume candles for the selected symbol and timeframe. Map the API response to the existing OHLCCandle type and replace the current static/demo data with the live feed when the user enables 'Live Mode'.

quotes: ise live market se connect kro

acceptanceCriteria: A 'Live Mode' toggle is visible in the DataInputPanel or header area.
When Live Mode is enabled, the app polls the Binance public klines endpoint every 10 seconds for the selected symbol (e.g., BTCUSDT) and timeframe.
Fetched candles are mapped to OHLCCandle format and passed through all existing analysis pipelines (patterns, EMA, trend, volume, S/R, signal aggregation).
The candlestick chart and signal display update automatically with each new data fetch without requiring manual user action.
A visible 'LIVE' status indicator (e.g., pulsing green dot) is shown when live mode is active.
When Live Mode is disabled, the app falls back to the existing manual/demo data entry behavior.
Fetch errors are handled gracefully with a toast notification and the last successful data remains displayed.

requirements.text: Add a symbol selector in Live Mode that allows the user to choose from a preset list of popular trading pairs (e.g., BTCUSDT, ETHUSDT, BNBUSDT, SOLUSDT, XRPUSDT) and maps each symbol + timeframe selection to the correct Binance klines API parameters (symbol and interval query params).

quotes: ise live market se connect kro

acceptanceCriteria: A dropdown or tab selector for symbol is shown when Live Mode is active.
Supported symbols include at least: BTCUSDT, ETHUSDT, BNBUSDT, SOLUSDT, XRPUSDT.
Timeframe selector values (1m, 5m, 15m, 1H, 4H, Daily) are correctly mapped to Binance interval values (1m, 5m, 15m, 1h, 4h, 1d).
Changing symbol or timeframe in Live Mode immediately triggers a fresh data fetch and re-runs all analysis pipelines.

requirements.text: Display a real-time price ticker in the dashboard header showing the current last price, 24h change percentage, and 24h high/low for the active live symbol, fetched from the Binance public ticker endpoint (https://api.binance.com/api/v3/ticker/24hr). Update this ticker every 10 seconds when Live Mode is active.

quotes: ise live market se connect kro

acceptanceCriteria: A price ticker strip is visible in the header when Live Mode is enabled.
Ticker shows: symbol name, last price (monospace font), 24h change % (green if positive, red if negative), 24h high, and 24h low.
Ticker updates every 10 seconds without a full page reload.
Ticker is hidden or shows a placeholder when Live Mode is disabled.

constraints: Only use Binance public REST API endpoints — no API key or authentication required.
Do not modify immutable frontend paths: frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, frontend/src/components/ui.
Do not alter the existing OHLCCandle type interface in frontend/src/types/trading.ts — map API data to the existing type.
No WebSocket or real-time streaming — use polling only.
All analysis (patterns, EMA, trend, volume, S/R, signal aggregation) must continue to run on the fetched live data using existing library functions unchanged.
nonGoals: No trading execution or order placement functionality.
No authenticated Binance account features (no API key management, no private endpoints).
No financial advice or guarantee of signal accuracy — existing disclaimer behavior must remain.
No backend changes for live data — all market data fetching stays on the frontend.
No WebSocket or push-based real-time streaming.
No support for exchanges other than Binance public API in this iteration.
